action.reasoning: Observation: Runtime error 'TypeError: sum() received an invalid combination of arguments' in calculate_laplacian because adj_mx was converted to torch tensor before being passed to np.sum. Analysis: In STGCN init, we convert numpy adj_mx to torch, then call calculate_laplacian(adj_mx) which expects numpy. Need to fix order: compute laplacian on numpy first, then convert to torch. Decision: Fix model.py, rerun training for 5 epochs, then submit eval. Also add a fallback in predict.py to recalculate A_hat from adj_mx if not in checkpoint (safer).
